MEMORANDUM IN OPPOSITION TO MOTION RE PETITIONER DAVID RAWLINGS VERIFIED PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDAMUS AND REQUEST FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF MANDAMUS ORDERING INSPECTION OF CORPORATE BOOKS AND RECORDS (TRANSACTION ID # 56816782) FILED BY RESPONDENT TALK FREE, INC

LAW AND MOTION, 302, PETITIONER DAVID RAWLINGS' VERIFIED PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDAMUS FOR INSPECTION OF CORPORATE BOOKS AND RECORDS IS DENIED AS MOOT. THE EVIDENCE ESTABLISHES THAT RESPONDENT HAS SUBSTANTIALLY COMPLIED WITH PETITIONER'S REQUEST FOR DOCUMENTS. PETITIONER'S REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS IS DENIED. THE EVIDENCE SHOWS THAT THE PARTIES WERE IN THE PROCESS OF MEETING AND CONFERRING ABOUT PRODUCING THE DOCUMENTS AT THE TIME THE PETITION WAS FILED. AS SUCH, PETITIONER HAS NOT ESTABLISHED THAT THE PETITION WAS THE CATALYST FOR THE PRODUCTION OF THE RECORDS. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR # 7489 (302/EHG)
ORDER AFTER HEARING DENYING MOTION OF PETITIONER DAVID RAWLINGS FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF MANDAMUS ORDERING INSPECTION OF CORPORATE BOOKS AND RECORDS

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion Re Petitioner David Rawlings Verified Petition For Writ Of Mandamus And Request For Issuance Of Writ Of Mandamus Ordering Inspection Of Corporate Books And Records
Off Calendar Mar-13-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JOSEPH S. LEVENTHAL OF THE LEVENTHAL LAW, TEL. NO. (619) 356-3518 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
ATTY. ERNEST BANCHERO, TEL. NO. 398-7000 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER DAVID RAWLINGS' Verified Petition For Writ Of Mandamus For Inspection Of Corporate Books And Records is Denied as moot. The evidence establishes that Respondent has substantially complied with Petitioner's request for documents. Petitioner's request for attorney's fees and costs is denied. The evidence shows that the parties were in the process of meeting and conferring about producing the documents at the time the Petition was filed. As such, Petitioner has not established that the Petition was the catalyst for the production of the records. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/ehg

Notice Of Motion Re Petitioner David Rawlings Verified Petition For Writ Of Mandamus And Request For Issuance Of Writ Of Mandamus Ordering Inspection Of Corporate Books And Records
Off Calendar Feb-13-2015 Continued To Mar-13-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
